'''Gjeel Dhantra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] who worked as [[Pok Nar-Ten]]'s [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]]. It was said that Pok trusted him like a brother.

{{Char-stub}}
